Title: Registration — Personal Account
Preconditions: Fresh browser, {{FRONT_URL}} accessible, unique test email available
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-up
[WAIT] account type selector visible
[ACT] select 'Personal' account type
[ACT] fill 'First Name': 'Test'
[ACT] fill 'Last Name': 'User'
[ACT] fill 'Email': unique test email (not {{USER_EMAIL}})
[ACT] fill 'Password': valid password
[ACT] check 'I agree to the Terms and Conditions'
[ACT] click 'Create Account'
[WAIT] redirect to homepage OR confirmation message
Assertions:
[DOM] confirmation message shown OR user redirected to authenticated homepage
[DOM] user name visible in header after redirect
[STATE] login with new credentials succeeds on retry
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST to /connect/token returns 200 with access_token
[ADMIN] user visible under Customers in admin panel
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors during form submit
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on account creation request
Failure_Signals: Validation error on valid email format, form stays on same page with no feedback, 400/500 on account create API, spinner stuck >5s
Cleanup: Delete test account via admin if environment requires cleanup

Title: Registration — Organization Account
Preconditions: Fresh browser, {{FRONT_URL}} accessible, unique company name available
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-up
[WAIT] account type selector visible
[ACT] select 'Organization' account type
[WAIT] 'Company Name' field appears
[ACT] fill 'Company Name': unique company name
[ACT] fill 'First Name', 'Last Name', 'Email', 'Password'
[ACT] check 'Terms and Conditions'
[ACT] click 'Create Account'
[WAIT] redirect to homepage OR confirmation
Assertions:
[DOM] success message OR authenticated homepage
[DOM] organization name visible in account context area
[STATE] user has B2B navigation items accessible (Quotes, Company Members)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST account creation returns 200
[ADMIN] organization appears in Organizations list
[ADMIN] user assigned as organization admin role
[CONSOLE] no errors during submission
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: Organization account type option missing from selector, company name field not shown after selecting org type, org not created in admin, B2B nav absent
Cleanup: Delete test org via admin if needed

Title: Sign In — Personal User
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/account/login
[WAIT] login form visible
[ACT] fill 'Email': {{USER_EMAIL}}
[ACT] fill 'Password': {{USER_PASSWORD}}
[ACT] click 'Sign In'
[WAIT] redirect to homepage or dashboard
[ASSERT] 'OrgName / UserName' button visible in top-right header
[ASSERT] 'Dashboard' link visible in top header
[ASSERT] cart icon visible in main nav icon bar
Assertions:
[DOM] 'OrgName / UserName' button in header (new March 2026 design)
[DOM] 'Dashboard' quick-link visible next to 'Contacts' in top header
[DOM] cart icon (→ /cart) accessible in nav icon bar
[DOM] Lists, Orders, Bulk Order icons in nav icon bar
[STATE] user is authenticated (no login prompt on protected pages)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST /connect/token returns 200 with access_token
[GQL] me query returns userId and email non-null
[CONSOLE] no 401 or authentication errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx on subsequent page load API calls
Failure_Signals: Invalid credentials error on valid credentials, redirect loop, spinner stuck >5s, 'OrgName / UserName' button absent, Dashboard link missing from header

Title: Sign In — Organization User
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/account/login
[WAIT] login form visible
[ACT] fill 'Email': {{ORG_USER_EMAIL}}
[ACT] fill 'Password': {{ORG_USER_PASSWORD}}
[ACT] click 'Sign In'
[WAIT] redirect to homepage
[ASSERT] 'OrgName / UserName' button visible showing org name
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/company/members
[WAIT] Company Members page loads
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/account/quotes
[WAIT] Quote Requests page loads
Assertions:
[DOM] organization name visible in 'OrgName / UserName' header button
[DOM] /company/members page accessible (not 403 or redirect)
[DOM] /account/quotes page accessible
[STATE] me.organization populated (not null) — may require page refresh (ECL-14.3)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[GQL] me query returns organization field with orgId and orgName
[CONSOLE] no errors

Failure_Signals: Login succeeds but organization context absent (me.organization is null after refresh), /company/members returns 403, B2B nav pages inaccessible

Title: Catalog — Category Navigation
Preconditions: User logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}, at least one category with products exists
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/catalog
[WAIT] category list visible
[ACT] click on first available category (e.g., 'Snacks')
[WAIT] product listing loads
[ACT] click on a subcategory (if available, e.g., 'Chips')
[WAIT] filtered product list loads
Assertions:
[DOM] products listed with names, prices, images
[DOM] breadcrumbs show: Home > [Category] > [Subcategory]
[DOM] product count label visible (e.g., '24 items')
[DOM] facet/filter panel available on left or top
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[GQL] categories + products query returns items array non-empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during category navigation
[NETWORK] no 4xx on catalog queries
Failure_Signals: Category loads with 0 products (unless truly empty), breadcrumbs missing, console 4xx on catalog query, facets absent

Title: Search — Basic Query
Preconditions: User logged in, products exist in catalog, search index healthy
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] click search bar
[ACT] type 'snack' (known-existing product term)
[KEY] Enter (or click search icon)
[WAIT] search results page loads at /search?q=snack
Assertions:
[DOM] URL is /search?q=snack
[DOM] page title or heading contains search term
[DOM] at least 1 product result visible
[DOM] result count label visible (e.g., 'X results for snack')
[DOM] filter/facet panel available on results page
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[GQL] products query with filter term returns items array non-empty
[CONSOLE] no search-related errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx on search request
Failure_Signals: Zero results for known-existing term (search index down — ECL-14.2), filter panel absent, result count shows 0 while products visible, console errors, URL does not contain /search?q=

Title: Add to Cart — Single Product
Preconditions: User logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}, product {{TEST_SKU}} in stock
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/product/{{TEST_SKU}}
[WAIT] 'Add to Cart' button visible and enabled
[ACT] set quantity to 1 (if spinbutton not already at 1)
[ACT] click 'Add to Cart'
[WAIT] success notification visible OR cart badge increments
Assertions:
[DOM] toast/notification contains 'added' or 'cart' text
[DOM] cart icon badge increments by 1
[STATE] product appears in mini-cart or cart page
[FORMAT] all prices display with exactly 2 decimal places
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST /graphql (addItem mutation) returns HTTP 200
[GQL] addItem response errors[] is empty
[GQL] cart.items contains item with sku={{TEST_SKU}}
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors during add action
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on addItem request
Failure_Signals: Spinner visible >5s after click, errors[] non-empty in addItem response, cart badge unchanged after 3s, 4xx/5xx on addItem, console TypeError
Cleanup: Remove {{TEST_SKU}} from cart after test (removeCartItem or clear cart)

Title: Cart Operations — View and Update
Preconditions: Products already in cart (at least 1 item), user logged in
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] cart page loads with items
[ASSERT] all items visible with names, images, prices
[ACT] click '+' (increase quantity) on first item
[WAIT] quantity value increments, line total recalculates
[ACT] click 'Remove' or trash icon on an item (use second item if only 1 remains)
[WAIT] item removed from list, cart total updates
Assertions:
[DOM] all items display name, image, price, quantity before changes
[DOM] line total = unit price × quantity after increment
[DOM] cart subtotal recalculates after quantity change
[DOM] removed item no longer appears in cart
[DOM] cart grand total updates after removal
[MATH] line total = unit price × updated quantity (2 decimal places)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[GQL] changeCartItemQuantity mutation returns 200, errors[] empty
[GQL] removeCartItem mutation returns 200, errors[] empty
[GQL] cart.total in response matches displayed grand total
[CONSOLE] no errors during quantity changes
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on cart update calls
Failure_Signals: Quantity change not reflected in line total, total doesn't recalculate after update, remove action silently fails, errors[] non-empty on cart mutation
Cleanup: Restore cart to known state if test removed the only item

Title: Checkout — Standard Delivery
Preconditions: Products in cart, {{USER_EMAIL}} logged in, shipping addresses configured in account
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] cart page loads
[ACT] select 'Delivery' shipping option (not Pickup)
[WAIT] shipping address section visible
[ACT] select existing shipping address OR enter new address
[ACT] select shipping method 'Ground' (or first available)
[WAIT] order summary shows shipping cost and updated total
[ASSERT] order total = subtotal + shipping + tax (BL-CHK-006)
[ACT] select payment method
[WAIT] payment section ready
[ACT] click 'Place Order' (or complete payment per payment method)
[WAIT] order confirmation page
Assertions:
[DOM] delivery option selectable and selected
[DOM] address form accepts input without validation errors on valid address
[DOM] shipping cost shows as non-zero amount in order summary
[DOM] order confirmation page displays order number in 'CO[digits]' format
[NAV] URL contains /order/ or /confirmation after successful placement
[MATH] displayed total = subtotal + shipping + tax - discounts (BL-CHK-006)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[GQL] addOrUpdateCartShipment mutation returns 200, errors[] empty
[GQL] createOrderFromCart mutation returns 200 with orderId (no errors[])
[ADMIN] order appears in admin panel with status 'New'
[CONSOLE] no errors during checkout flow
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on checkout API calls
Failure_Signals: Shipping methods not loading, address validation errors on valid address, 'Place Order' hangs >10s, createOrderFromCart errors[] non-empty, total mismatch (BL-CHK-006), redirect to error page
Cleanup: Note created orderId; cart cleared after successful order

Title: Checkout — BOPIS Pickup
Preconditions: Products in cart, pickup locations configured in system, {{USER_EMAIL}} logged in
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] cart page loads
[ACT] select 'Pickup' shipping option
[WAIT] 'Select pickup location' button visible
[ACT] click 'Select pickup location'
[WAIT] pickup location modal opens
[ACT] select a pickup location from list
[ACT] confirm selection
[WAIT] checkout updates to show pickup location selected
[ACT] select payment method
[ACT] click 'Place Order'
[WAIT] order confirmation page
Assertions:
[DOM] Pickup option available alongside Delivery
[DOM] location selection modal opens on click
[DOM] at least one pickup location selectable in modal
[DOM] shipping cost = $0.00 for pickup (BL-SHIP-002)
[DOM] order confirmation shows selected pickup location name
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[GQL] addOrUpdateCartShipment with fulfillmentCenterId returns 200, errors[] empty
[GQL] cart.shipments[0].fulfillmentCenter populated with selected location
[GQL] createOrderFromCart returns orderId, errors[] empty
[CONSOLE] no errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: Pickup option missing from cart, location modal doesn't open, location list empty, shipping cost non-zero for pickup, fulfillmentCenter absent in API response

Title: Payment — Credit Card Authorization
Preconditions: Checkout ready (cart with items, address selected), test card details available from .env
Assertions:
[DOM] payment form visible with card number, expiry, CVV fields
[DOM] card fields accept test card input without masking errors
[DOM] after submit: 'Place Order' button disabled immediately (BL-CHK-002: double-submit prevention)
[DOM] after submit: success message OR order confirmation visible
[STATE] order status = 'New' or 'Payment authorized' (not 'Payment failed')
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] payment processor webhook received (verify via admin order payment status)
[ADMIN] order payment status = Authorized or Paid
[CONSOLE] no payment script errors (note: ad-blockers may block iframe — ECL-14.6)
[NETWORK] no CORS errors on payment form requests
Failure_Signals: Payment form blank after page load (iframe blocked by ad-blocker — ECL-14.6), card fields reject valid test card, payment hangs >30s, 3DS challenge appears in test mode, button remains active after first click (BL-CHK-002)

Title: Order Confirmation — Verify Details and Side Effects
Preconditions: Order just completed (follow-on from SMK-009 or SMK-011)
Steps:
[WAIT] on confirmation page after order placed
[ASSERT] order number visible on page in 'CO[digits]' format (BL-ORD-005)
[ASSERT] line items listed with names and prices
[ASSERT] totals on confirmation match cart totals from previous step (BL-CHK-006)
[ASSERT] cart icon badge = 0 (cart cleared — BL-CROSS-005)
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[WAIT] order history page loads
[ASSERT] most recent order in list matches the just-placed order number
Assertions:
[DOM] order number generated and displayed (e.g., format 'CO[digits]')
[DOM] all ordered products listed on confirmation page with names
[DOM] confirmation subtotal matches cart subtotal (within rounding — BL-PRICE-003)
[DOM] cart badge = 0 after order (cart cleared — BL-CROSS-005)
[DOM] order appears in /account/orders list (BL-CROSS-005)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[GQL] order query by orderId returns correct items and totals
[CONSOLE] no errors on confirmation page (especially on analytics events)
[NETWORK] GA4 'purchase' event fired with correct order ID and revenue (BL-CROSS-005)
Failure_Signals: Confirmation page missing order number, totals mismatch vs cart (BL-CHK-006), order absent from history (BL-CROSS-005), cart not cleared after order, duplicate order if page refreshed (ECL-11.1)

Title: Account — Manage Shipping Address
Preconditions: User logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}} (personal account, not org user — addresses link only shown for personal accounts)
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/account/dashboard
[WAIT] dashboard sidebar visible
[ASSERT] 'Addresses' link visible in sidebar (personal account only — ECL-14.3)
[ACT] click 'Addresses' in sidebar
[WAIT] addresses list page loads
[ACT] click 'Add address' or '+ New address' button
[WAIT] address form opens
[ACT] fill in address fields: First Name, Last Name, Street, City, State/Region, ZIP, Country
[ACT] click 'Save' or 'Add address'
[WAIT] success toast OR address appears in list
[ASSERT] new address visible in addresses list
Assertions:
[DOM] 'Addresses' sidebar link visible for personal account user
[DOM] address list page loads without errors
[DOM] 'Add address' button visible
[DOM] address form accepts all standard fields
[DOM] success toast shown after save
[DOM] new address visible in list with correct street/city/state/zip
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[GQL] updateContact mutation (or addAddress) returns 200, errors[] empty
[GQL] me query after add shows new address in addresses array
[CONSOLE] no errors during address add
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on address save
Failure_Signals: 'Addresses' link absent for personal user (check not org account — ECL-14.3), address form validation errors on valid address, address not appearing in list after save, 4xx/5xx on address API
Cleanup: Delete test address if not the default

Title: B2B — Organization Switch Isolates Cart
Preconditions: User logged in as {{ORG_USER_EMAIL}} who belongs to at least 2 organizations, at least one product in cart as first org
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/account/login
[ACT] fill 'Email': {{ORG_USER_EMAIL}}
[ACT] fill 'Password': {{ORG_USER_PASSWORD}}
[ACT] click 'Sign In'
[WAIT] authenticated — note current org name in header button
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/product/{{TEST_SKU}}
[ACT] click 'Add to Cart'
[WAIT] cart badge > 0
[ACT] click 'OrgName / UserName' button in header
[WAIT] account dropdown opens with Organizations section
[ACT] click radio button for a DIFFERENT organization in the list
[WAIT] page refreshes or context updates
[ASSERT] cart badge = 0 (cart isolated — BL-B2B-001)
[ASSERT] org name in header shows the newly selected org
Assertions:
[DOM] account dropdown shows Organizations section with radio buttons and search
[DOM] switching org updates the 'OrgName / UserName' header button text
[DOM] cart badge = 0 after org switch (BL-B2B-001, BL-CROSS-008)
[STATE] cart for new org is empty (not carrying over previous org's items)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[GQL] cart query for new org context returns empty items[] (BL-CART-005)
[GQL] me query shows new org in organization field
[CONSOLE] no errors during org switch
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on org switch
Failure_Signals: Org A cart items visible after switching to Org B (BL-B2B-001 violation), cart badge not clearing, org name in header unchanged, dropdown missing Organizations section, ECL-14.3: org context null on first load
Cleanup: Switch back to original org; restore cart if needed

Title: Search to Cart — End-to-End Flow
Preconditions: User logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}, cart empty, at least one simple (non-configurable) product exists with known search term
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] click search bar
[ACT] type 'snack' (known-existing product term)
[KEY] Enter
[WAIT] search results page loads at /search?q=snack
[ASSERT] at least one product result visible
[ACT] click the first matching product name to open PDP
[WAIT] product PDP loads
[ASSERT] price displays with 2 decimal places
[ACT] click 'Add to Cart'
[WAIT] cart badge increments
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] cart page loads
[ASSERT] product appears in cart with correct price
Assertions:
[DOM] search results show products matching the search term
[DOM] PDP price displays with exactly 2 decimal places (BL-PRICE-003)
[DOM] 'Add to Cart' button enabled on PDP
[DOM] cart badge increments after add
[DOM] cart page shows product with correct name and price
[MATH] cart line total = unit price × qty (2 decimal places — BL-PRICE-003)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[GQL] products query returns items with matching search term, non-empty
[GQL] addItem mutation errors[] empty
[GQL] cart.items contains correct SKU
[CONSOLE] no errors during search-to-cart flow
[NETWORK] no 4xx during search or add
Failure_Signals: Search returns no results for known term (index down — ECL-14.2), PDP price missing decimal places, add fails or no badge increment, cart shows wrong price
Cleanup: Remove product from cart after test

Title: GA4 — Purchase Event Fires on Order Completion
Preconditions: Order just completed (follow-on from SMK-009 or SMK-011 or SMK-010). GA4 / dataLayer tracking enabled in store.
Steps:
[WAIT] on order confirmation page (after successful order placement)
[ACT] evaluate window.dataLayer to check for 'purchase' event: window.dataLayer.filter(e => e.event === 'purchase')
[ASSERT] purchase event found in dataLayer
[ASSERT] event.ecommerce.transaction_id matches the order number on confirmation page
[ASSERT] event.ecommerce.value is a positive number matching order total
[ASSERT] event.ecommerce.items array is non-empty
[ACT] evaluate for duplicate purchase events: window.dataLayer.filter(e => e.event === 'purchase').length === 1
Assertions:
[STATE] window.dataLayer contains exactly 1 'purchase' event (BL-CROSS-005, ECL-11.1)
[STATE] purchase event transaction_id = order number shown on confirmation page
[STATE] purchase event value = order total (positive number, 2 decimal places)
[STATE] purchase event items[] non-empty, item names match ordered products
[STATE] NO duplicate purchase events (ECL-11.1: confirm page refresh should not re-fire)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no GA4 script errors or blocked resource warnings
[NETWORK] GA4 /collect request fired with correct transaction_id and value
[CONSOLE] dataLayer.push for 'purchase' event visible in console output
Failure_Signals: dataLayer missing 'purchase' event (BL-CROSS-005), transaction_id mismatch vs order number, value = 0 or negative, items[] empty, duplicate events fired on page refresh (ECL-11.1)

Title: Quantity Stepper — PDP Increment and Cart Sync
Preconditions: User logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}, in-stock product available with stock > 3
Steps:
[NAV] known in-stock product PDP on {{FRONT_URL}}
[WAIT] 'Product quantity' spinbutton visible
[ASSERT] spinbutton shows '0' and 'Decrease quantity' button is disabled
[ACT] click 'Increase quantity' button
[WAIT] spinbutton shows '1', 'in Cart' indicator shows '1'
[ASSERT] cart badge = 1
[ACT] click 'Increase quantity' button again
[WAIT] spinbutton shows '2'
[ASSERT] cart badge = 2
[ACT] click 'Decrease quantity' button
[WAIT] spinbutton shows '1'
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] cart loads
[ASSERT] product shown with qty 1, line total = 1 × unit price
[ACT] click '+' on cart page to increase qty to 2
[WAIT] line total updates
[ASSERT] line total = 2 × unit price
Assertions:
[DOM] 'Decrease quantity' disabled at qty=0 (not clickable)
[DOM] spinbutton increments and decrements correctly
[DOM] 'in Cart' indicator on PDP reflects current quantity
[DOM] cart badge equals spinbutton value after each change
[DOM] no duplicate line items for same product in cart (BL-CART-007)
[MATH] cart line total = qty × unit price (2 decimal places)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[GQL] each +/- triggers addItem or changeCartItemQuantity mutation, errors[] empty
[GQL] cart.items shows correct quantity after each change
[CONSOLE] no errors on rapid +/- clicks
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on cart mutations
Failure_Signals: 'Decrease quantity' clickable at qty=0, cart badge not syncing with PDP stepper, duplicate line items appearing (BL-CART-007), line total not recalculating, negative quantity accepted (ECL-5.3)
Cleanup: Remove product from cart after test

Title: B2C Variation — Select Option and Add to Cart
Preconditions: User logged in. B2C variation product with VirtoFrontend_UI_Layout=B2C property exists in catalog with 2+ in-stock variants (color or size). {{FRONT_URL}} accessible.
Steps:
[NAV] B2C variation product PDP (e.g., in /products-with-options/variations-of-jeans/ category)
[WAIT] 'Options' section visible (B2C layout)
[ASSERT] 'Add to Cart' button is disabled before any option selected (BL-CAT-006)
[ACT] click first available option (e.g., color swatch 'Blue' or size 'M')
[WAIT] option shows selected state (border highlight or checkmark)
[ASSERT] product price updates to selected variant's price (no page reload)
[ASSERT] main product image updates to variant image
[ASSERT] 'Add to Cart' button is now enabled
[ACT] click 'Add to Cart'
[WAIT] success notification appears
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] cart loads
[ASSERT] cart line item shows variant attribute detail (e.g., 'T-Shirt — Color: Blue')
Assertions:
[DOM] 'Options' section visible on PDP; standard variation table hidden
[DOM] 'Add to Cart' disabled before any option selected (BL-CAT-006, ECL-14.5)
[DOM] clicked option shows selected visual state (border/checkmark)
[DOM] price updates immediately after option click (no reload)
[DOM] main image switches to variant-specific image
[DOM] 'Add to Cart' enabled after selection
[DOM] cart line item shows variant attribute name+value, not parent product name only
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[GQL] product.variants in response contain distinct prices per variantId
[GQL] addItem mutation uses selected variantId, errors[] empty
[GQL] cart.items[].name or cart.items[].selectedAttributes contains variant descriptor
[CONSOLE] no errors during option selection or add to cart
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: 'Add to Cart' enabled before selection (BL-CAT-006, ECL-14.5), price not updating on option click, cart shows parent product name without variant detail, image not switching (ECL-14.5), addItem uses parent SKU instead of variant SKU (ECL-14.1)

Title: B2C Variation — Price and Stock Update on Selection
Preconditions: User logged in. B2C variation product with 2+ variants at different prices exists. {{FRONT_URL}} accessible.
Steps:
[NAV] B2C variation product PDP with variants at different prices
[WAIT] 'From $X' price or base price displayed before selection
[ACT] click first option (e.g., Size 'S')
[WAIT] price updates to variant-specific price
[ASSERT] price shows exactly 2 decimal places (BL-PRICE-003)
[ACT] click a different option (e.g., Size 'L') with a different price
[WAIT] price updates again
[ASSERT] price updated to second variant's price
[ASSERT] stock indicator reflects selected variant's stock (not aggregate)
[ASSERT] SKU on page updates to selected variant's SKU
Assertions:
[DOM] price before selection: 'From $X' or base price
[DOM] price after first selection: variant-specific price, 2 decimal places (BL-PRICE-003)
[DOM] price changes again after switching to second variant (no reload)
[DOM] stock indicator is per-variant ('In Stock' or 'Out of Stock') not parent aggregate
[DOM] SKU code on page matches selected variant's SKU
[FORMAT] price always 2 decimal places (e.g., '$24.99' not '$24.9')
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[GQL] product.variants each have distinct price values in xAPI response
[GQL] selectedVariant.price in response matches DOM displayed price
[CONSOLE] no errors during variant switching
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx during option selection
Failure_Signals: Price unchanged after switching variants (stale cache — ECL-14.4), stock indicator shows parent aggregate instead of variant-specific (ECL-14.5), SKU not updating on selection, price displays >2 decimal places (BL-PRICE-003)
